visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and a light grey shirt is the central figure. She is seated at a table featuring a large white plate overflowing with fish-shaped snacks, a blue snack bag, and a mug of beer. She smiles widely, gesturing towards the food. The background is a plain, brightly lit indoor wall. (2) Two masculine arms extend from behind the woman's shoulders, acting as if they are her own. These hands pick up snacks from the plate and feed them to her mouth. She reacts with playful, exaggerated expressions of surprise and enjoyment. (3) The camera shifts to close-up shots of the individual snacks, highlighting their golden-brown color and crunchy texture. A smartphone screen is briefly shown displaying a bowl of spicy Korean chicken feet for a side-by-side comparison of snack pairings. (4) The scene transitions to a living room where a middle-aged man wearing glasses and a grey t-shirt sits on a sofa. He holds two bags of the same blue-packaged snacks and is shown happily eating them. (5) Back to the woman, she continues to eat and take sips of beer from the glass. She gives a double thumbs-up to the camera while descriptive text regarding the product's availability appears as a footer overlay.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: POV 用男朋友雙手吃台灣餅乾. [Subtitle]: Using My Boyfriend's Hand to Eat Snacks. [Subtitle]: 韓國女友. (2) [Variety]: （超會演）. [Variety]: （星期三的小手？）. [Variety]: （調皮）. (3) [Slogan]: 孔雀香酥脆. [Variety]: （幸福極了）. (4) [Variety]: （超餵食我！！！）. [Variety]: （男友也想吃了🤣）. [Variety]: 唰嘴. (5) [Slogan]: 販售通路：便利商店、全聯福利中心、量販店、連鎖超市、在地超市、電商平台. [Slogan]: 孔雀香酥脆.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 man (boyfriend, partially visible hands/back), 1 man (father on sofa).
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a casual light grey t-shirt and light blue nail polish.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, minimalist indoor setting with white walls in the first half, transitioning to a living room with a blue sofa and pillows in the second half.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with a high-energy, synthesized pop background track featuring a driving 4/4 beat. A clear, high-pitched female voice narrates enthusiastically in Mandarin. (2) A sharp 'pop' sound effect triggers as variety text appears on screen. This is followed by a crisp, high-frequency 'crunch' sound when the character is fed the snack. (3) The vocal narration remains rapid and animated, with frequent pitch fluctuations to express excitement. The BGM remains consistent in tempo. (4) A bubbly sound effect occurs as the character drinks beer. The narrator's tone shifts slightly to a storytelling mode when describing the father's reaction. (5) The phase concludes with the primary narrator's voice becoming more directive, accompanied by upbeat stingers and a final percussive hit as the promotional information is displayed.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Personal Experience -> Social Validation -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To market 'Peacock Crispy Snacks' (孔雀香酥脆) by leveraging a popular 'POV' humor trend and highlighting the product's flavor profile, crunchiness, and suitability as a beer snack.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product packaging, multiple consumption shots, detailed availability info (sales channels), and a clear promotional narrative.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-arousal social media editing style with dense visual variety text to maintain viewer retention.
